leadText: The Smart Candy (Japanese: ちしきのアメ Knowledge Candy) is a type of Candy introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it increases that Pokémon's Special Attack by 1 AV , up until it has reached 50 AVs in Special Attack.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A candy that is packed with energy. When given to a Pokémon, it will increase that Pokémon's Sp. Attack.
